name: 150W LED Canopy Light AC 120~277V 0~10V Dimming CCT 5700K
description: The ZION LED USA 150W LED Canopy Light delivers reliable, high-efficiency illumination tailored for outdoor and commercial environments. Operating on a wide input voltage range of AC 120–277V, this fixture also features 0–10V dimming capabilities for flexible light level control. With a crisp 5700K daylight color temperature, it ensures excellent visibility and safety. Engineered for durability and long-term performance, this canopy light offers powerful brightness while optimizing energy savings.
short_desc: Features: Wattage: 150W Input Voltage: AC 120–277V Dimming: 0–10V dimmable for adjustable brightness Color Temperature: 5700K (daylight-white) High Efficiency: Delivers clear, consistent illumination Energy Saving: Reduces operational costs with superior efficacy Durable Construction: Designed for demanding outdoor conditions Applications: Gas Stations Parking Garages Industrial Facilities Warehouses Large Outdoor Areas Commercial Buildings
